title: DFTO procurement policy
body: "This policy sets out principles to ensure that procurement activities across the DfT Operator Limited (DFTO) Group are compliant with regulatory and legislative controls,  including the Procurement Act 2023.  It explains how DFTO and its subsidiaries will treat suppliers equally and without discrimination, acting in a transparent and proportionate manner. The policy also outlines how contracts and other supply arrangements will be awarded, based on the most advantageous tender or other proposal.  "
